name: Garlicky Pasta with Fresh Green Herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti until al dente.
2. Heat the garlic in the olive oil until it smells fragrant, just a few moments.
3. Toss in the herbs and remove from heat.
4. Drain the pasta and toss in the pan with the garlicky herbs.
5. Season with salt and pepper, then serve.
6. Do not add cheese as it only interferes with the herby flavors.
